name: DigiCrypts Blockchain Solutions Inc.
summary: DigiCrypts Blockchain Solutions Inc. operates in digital security space worldwide. It provides consulting services to operating businesses and helps them to raise capital through the issuance of traditional securities. The company also offers Artificial Intelligence based data analytics services. The company was formerly known as TJR Coatings Inc. and changed its name to DigiCrypts Blockchain Solutions Inc. in May 2018. DigiCrypts Blockchain Solutions Inc. is based in Toronto, Canada.
